name: whatsapp-automation-free-demo
description: Fixed WhatsApp Web automation project with QR status handling, live Google Sheet CSV FAQ replies, local logs, and dashboard.

scripts.setup:windows: set PUPPETEER_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=true&& set PUPPETEER_SKIP_CHROMIUM_DOWNLOAD=true&& npm install --ignore-scripts
scripts.clean:windows: if exist node_modules rmdir /s /q node_modules && if exist package-lock.json del /f /q package-lock.json
